findings.title: Integer overflow in gross pay calculation
findings.description: Chained multiplication of overtimeHours * hourlyRateCents * overtimeMultiplierPct overflows int

findings.title: Integer overflow in tax calculation
findings.description: Multiplication of int grossCents by int taxRateBP can exceed Integer.MAX_VALUE

findings.title: Integer overflow in total payroll accumulation
findings.description: Running int sum of gross pay values overflows when multiple large entries are accumulated

findings.title: Integer overflow in bonus calculation
findings.description: Multiplication of int baseSalary by bonusPct from user input can exceed Integer.MAX_VALUE

findings.title: Integer overflow in paystub buffer allocation
findings.description: int multiplication of employeeCount by bytesPerStub can wrap to small positive value bypassing negative check

findings.title: Short integer overflow in paycheck number
findings.description: Addition of two short values cast back to short truncates when sum exceeds Short.MAX_VALUE

findings.title: Integer overflow in retirement contribution chain
findings.description: Chain of three dependent int multiplications where overflow cascades through contribution and match calculations
